fields.summary: Terraform IAM role missing assume role policy

resolution.name: Added trust relationship for EC2 service

fields.description:
aws_iam_role resource is missing assume_role_policy

Terraform plan succeeds but apply fails with AccessDenied

comments.body: First investigation comment - not the resolution
Final fix: added trust relationship for ec2.amazonaws.com service principal

fields.summary: VPC subnet CIDR conflict blocking terraform apply

resolution.name: Changed subnet CIDR to non-overlapping range

fields.description: aws_subnet resource has CIDR overlap with existing subnet

fields.summary: Lambda function timeout on cold start
fields.description: aws_lambda_function times out after 3 seconds on cold start

fields.summary: S3 bucket versioning not enabled causing data loss risk

comments.body: Enabled versioning via aws_s3_bucket_versioning resource in terraform
